retry_reason: Not a wrapper — retry behavior is irrelevant.

judge.reason: The primary purpose of btrfs_cross_ref_exist is to check whether an extent has a cross-reference (shared). It calls internal helpers check_committed_ref and check_delayed_ref to perform this check. The only refcount operation is btrfs_release_path at the end, which is merely cleanup of a passed-in path argument. The function does not acquire, transfer, or initialize a reference on any object, nor does it return a reference-counted object to the caller. The refcount release is incidental to the function's larger business logic.
judge.retry_reason: Not a wrapper — retry behavior is irrelevant.
